policyname: Service role full access to developers
Users can access their own developer profile

qual:
((developer_id IN ( SELECT developers.id
   FROM developers
  WHERE ((developers.user_id)::text = (auth.uid())::text))) OR (auth.role() = 'service_role'::text))

((project_id IN ( SELECT p.id
   FROM (projects p
     JOIN developers d ON ((p.developer_id = d.id)))
  WHERE ((d.user_id)::text = (auth.uid())::text))) OR (auth.role() = 'service_role'::text))
